html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Bunnyman

Bunny Roll is a Food Item that can be obtained at a Bunnyman Shrine for 5 Lucky Gold Nuggets. It cannot be eaten by Wigfrid.

By TypeBy Crock Pot Value
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Bunnyman
Bunny Roll
"No bunnies were harmed in the making of this cake."
Food Info
75
15
8
Goodies
Object Info
15
Crafting
×5
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"yotr_food1"
“It's made with carrots, so science says it must be healthy.”
–Wilson
“Nice, the rabbits brought cake!”
–Willow
“Wolfgang likes the funny rabbit cake.”
–Wolfgang
“I think... I would like a bit of cake.”
–Wendy
“NO TRACE OF RABBIT DETECTED. DISAPPOINTING”
–WX-78
“Putting carrots in your dessert does not make it healthy, I'm afraid.”
–Wickerbottom
“Rabbits love carrots so much, they'll even put 'em in cakes.”
–Woodie
“Cake shaped like a rabbit, how novel.”
–Maxwell
“Bah! 'Tis naught but a meat-shaped veggie cake!”
–Wigfrid
“It looks like cake, but it smells like veggies...”
–Webber
“It's been so long since I've had such a scrumptious bite of carrot cake!”
–Warly
“Hopper?”
–Wormwood
“I guess a little cake break won't hurt anything.”
–Winona
“A funny shape for carrot cake.”
–Wortox
“Grrr, will gobble you up, rabbit! Hee-hee.”
–Wurt
“Time for a dessert break!”
–Walter
“Oh, well, perhaps just a quick slice or two.”
–Wanda
Bunny Roll is a Food Item that can be obtained at a Bunnyman Shrine for 5 Lucky Gold Nuggets. It cannot be eaten by Wigfrid.
